LanguageData.RimWorldBot.MainTab.Tooltip.Off: Bot fully disabled — no autonomy, no advisory overlay.
LanguageData.RimWorldBot.MainTab.Tooltip.Advisory: Bot computes alongside, shows Top-3 site overlay + decision trail — but takes no pawns.
LanguageData.RimWorldBot.MainTab.Tooltip.On: Bot controls pawns autonomously per master toggle + per-pawn checkbox.
LanguageData.RimWorldBot.Migration.DataLoss: RimWorldBot: migration data loss — {0} of {1} pawn settings could not be mapped.
LanguageData.RimWorldBot.Stability.RepeatedSessionExh: RimWorldBot disabled itself repeatedly across sessions — please report as a bug.
